name: Mahalakshmi
description: Monthly financial assistance of ₹2,500 to every woman, LPG cylinders at ₹500, and free travel for women in TSRTC buses
promised: ₹2,500/month to every woman head of household, LPG at ₹500, free bus travel for women
delivered: Free bus travel for women implemented. LPG subsidy partially rolled out. ₹2,500 monthly cash transfer NOT started.

name: Rythu Bharosa
description: ₹15,000/acre financial assistance to farmers, crop loan waiver up to ₹2 lakh, interest-free loans up to ₹3 lakh
promised: ₹15,000/acre to farmers, ₹12,000 to agri labour, crop loan waiver up to ₹2L, interest-free loans up to ₹3L
delivered: Loan waiver disbursed ₹20,617 crore to ~25 lakh farmers in tranches. Delays and errors in beneficiary lists. ₹15,000/acre input support not fully implemented.

name: Gruha Jyothi
description: Free electricity up to 200 units per household per month
promised: 200 units of free electricity to every household
delivered: Scheme rolled out in February 2024. Most eligible households receiving free electricity up to 200 units.

name: Indiramma Indlu
description: House site for families without own house and ₹5 lakh financial assistance for construction
promised: Free house site + ₹5 lakh construction assistance to every homeless family
delivered: Some beneficiaries identified but full-scale implementation has not begun. Land allocation stalled in most districts.

name: Yuva Vikasam
description: Fill 2 lakh government jobs in the first year, Vidya Bharosa cards for students, skill development
promised: 2,00,000 government jobs in first year, Vidya Bharosa education cards, free internet for students
delivered: ~57,946 posts filled by March 2025 (29% of target). Vidya Bharosa cards still pending. ₹11,000 crore budgetary allocation for schools made.

name: Cheyutha
description: Monthly pension of ₹4,000 for senior citizens, widows, disabled, beedi workers, single women, and others
promised: ₹4,000/month pension to senior citizens, widows, disabled, beedi workers, single women, weavers, AIDS/Filaria patients, dialysis patients
delivered: Pension amounts increased but not to full ₹4,000 for all categories. Coverage expanded but many eligible beneficiaries still excluded.
